For Gagan — from Chaitanya

Happy Father's
Day, Papa.

You've spent every day of my life looking after me. This is one small page trying to look after you back — for one day, at least.

scroll
A small note before we start

Every year I try to find a way to say thank you that doesn't sound like every other year. So this time I built you something instead of just texting it — mostly because you've spent my whole life building things for me, and "thanks Papa" alone has never felt like enough.

▲ Gagan Index · Live

A few numbers that never go down.

Patience, with me
∞
No expiry date. Has never once been sold.
Pizza approval rating
100%
Asked or not asked, the answer is always yes.
Card games won

And the ones I win, I'm fairly sure you let me.
Care for me
▲ ATH
All-time high. Still climbing, somehow.
What I've always known

A few things about you, Papa.

None of this is news to you. But it's worth writing down anyway — so you have it somewhere permanent, in case you ever forget.

Smart

You have an answer for almost everything — and it's usually the right one, even when I argue otherwise.

Caring

You notice when something's off before I've even said a word about it. You always have.

Hardworking

I've never once seen you give less than your full effort — at work, at home, at anything you take on.

Talented

Cards, current affairs, fixing things nobody else can fix — there isn't much you can't turn your hand to.

Makes me smile

Your jokes aren't always good. They're somehow always funny anyway.

Understanding

You never make me feel small for not having things figured out yet. Not once.

Things that are unmistakably you

The Gagan starter pack.

Pizza

Your answer to almost any bad day — and most good ones too.

Card games

Where you almost always come out on top, and never let me forget it.

The stock market

Up, down, sideways — you're watching it closely either way.

Walks with me

Your favourite way to just talk, with nowhere either of us has to be.

▲ Trending up, always

A few of my favourite frames.

Most charts have dips. Somehow, this one doesn't.

01

A hill station trip, somewhere up north, many years ago.

02

Hotel breakfasts where you'd let me steal half your plate.

03

You, mid-forest, doing your signature "I am one with nature" pose.

04

Cutting cake on the bed, because why not.

05

Pretending you weren't a little nervous about that boat.

06

Mid-unwrapping, completely unbothered by the mess around you.

07

The year we both decided matching t-shirts were a personality trait.

08

Caught off guard at a registration desk — apparently under CCTV surveillance, smiling anyway.

09

A quiet evening out, looking very pleased with the view — or the food.

10

Just you, mid-conversation, being completely yourself.

The actual point of this page

A letter, Papa.

Dear Papa,

I don't think I've ever properly told you this, so here it is in writing, where you can't wave it off with a "haan haan, theek hai" — thank you. For absolutely everything.

For the card games where you'd still beat me and somehow make it feel close anyway. For ordering pizza before I've even finished asking. For pampering me far more than I probably deserve, and never once making me feel bad about it. For taking me out, for the walks where you'd let me talk through whatever was on my mind with no lecture attached — just you, actually listening.

But if I had to pick one thing, it would be our late-night conversations — you going on about some stock you're tracking or something from the news, me half-following but completely happy just to be sitting there with you. Those are the moments I'll remember the longest. Not the big trips, not the gifts. Just you and me, talking about nothing important, at an hour we probably shouldn't have still been awake.

You're the smartest, most hardworking, most genuinely understanding person I know — and somehow you still make me laugh more than anyone else does. I know exactly how lucky that makes me.

Happy Father's Day, Papa. I love you.

Chaitanyayour son, grateful every single day
♡

Made for Gagan · Father's Day 2026
